findings.description: The LESS variable names used in default-color-scheme.less (@baseColor, @mainColor1, @mainColor2, @subColor) are omitted. The knowledge file only mentions the filename, not the actual variable names. An AI answering color customization questions would need these variable names.

The full path of the target file within the plugin directory (ui_public/css/color/default-color-scheme.less) is omitted. The knowledge file only states 'default-color-scheme.less を修正' without the subdirectory path, which is needed to locate the file.
findings.source_evidence:
xxx_project-css-color-default/
  ├── package.json
  └── ui_public/
      └── css/
          └── color/
              └── default-color-scheme.less #修正対象ファイル
